title: Chewy Brazilian Sevaiiya Noodles
description: A midnight craving Brazilian dish of fresh sevaiiya noodles tossed with smoky coconut‑curry sauce and fresh herbs for a chewy, bouncy-qq texture.
instructions: Rinse sevaiiya noodles in cold water and set aside.
Bring 1L water to a boil and add a pinch of salt.
Add noodles to boiling water and cook for 3 minutes, stirring gently.
Drain noodles and rinse with cold water to stop cooking; set aside.
Heat 1 tbsp oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add red curry paste and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Pour in coconut milk and bring to a gentle simmer.
Add julienned carrot and sliced bell pepper; cook for 2 minutes until tender but crisp.
Toss in drained noodles, lime juice, and cilantro; stir until noodles are coated and heated through.
Season with salt, optional crushed pepper, and serve immediately.
